name: Potato-Pear Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In an 8-quart saucepot over high heat, bring unpeeled potatoes and enough water to cover to a boil. Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 25-30 minutes, or until the potatoes are fork-tender.
2. Meanwhile, in a large bowl, whisk together salad oil, vinegar, salt, and pepper with a wire whisk or fork.
3. When the potatoes are done, drain them. Cool the potatoes until they are easy to handle. Peel and cut the potatoes into 1/8"-thick slices. Thinly slice the pears. Add the potatoes and pears to the dressing; toss gently until well coated.
4. Line a salad bowl with lettuce leaves. Spoon the mixture onto the lettuce. Serve warm, or cover and refrigerate to serve chilled later.
